channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Waymo’s newest robotaxi is Chinese-made, built to make money, and now accepting riders
item.description: The launch of the Ojai minivan robotaxi comes after years of development and testing, but arrives amid a challenging time for Waymo.

item.title: Samsung Odyssey G5 OLED, PlayStation VR2 et MacBook Neo en forte promo : les meilleurs bons plans du 28 mai 2026
item.description: Ce jeudi 28 mai 2026, plusieurs marchands comme Amazon, Boulanger ou Carrefour proposent d’excellentes réductions sur des produits tech majeurs.

item.title: Xreal is making budget XR smart glasses — and they give my favorite cheap specs a serious run for their money
item.description: The xbx a01 XR glasses from Xreal are budget-friendly but packed with features

item.title: Here’s where you can preorder the new Oura Ring 5
item.description: If you’ve been waiting for a smaller version of the Oura Ring, the company’s latest wearable is now available for preorder ahead of its June 4th release from Oura and various third-party retailers, including both Amazon and Walmart. The Oura Ring 5, which starts at $399, is 40 percent smaller than its predecessor, thanks to […]

item.title: Take-Two CEO seems to take shot at MindsEye studio, says 'the folks at Rockstar seem to be able to make these massive hits' while former Rockstar employees 'haven’t been able to do it'
item.description: Take-Two CEO Strauss Zelnick has said Grand Theft Auto 6 reviews will be just as important as the scores for all the other Rockstar Games titles.

item.title: It will take 200 years for the average worker to match annual CEO pay
item.description: A new analysis by the Associated Press and Equilar shows that median pay for CEOs in the S&P 500 soared to $17.7 million in 2025, while the median employee earned $89,744. The looming SpaceX IPO has drawn renewed attention to the astronomical pay that Elon Musk has secured through his companies.

item.title: The FBI warns Microsoft 365 services are being bombarded with new phishing emails — here are 3 steps you can take to stay safe
item.description: Kali365 is abusing legitimate Microsoft login mechanisms to hijack Outlook, Teams, and OneDrive services.

item.title: U.S. says troops were targeted with location data, as senator warns ad industry is a ‘national security threat’
item.description: One leading privacy lawmaker said it was time to "start treating the adtech industry as a national security threat."

item.title: I started asking ChatGPT one extra question — and its answers suddenly became far more useful
item.description: Adding one simple question to ChatGPT prompts helps the AI better understand what you actually need

item.title: A $2,000 AI-generated film will make its debut at Tribeca
item.description: Next month's Tribeca Festival will include the premiere of an AI-generated film: Dreams of Violets. The 75-minute film is a fictional dramatization of the Iranian government's mass killing of protestors in January, with the people and images fully created by AI, as reported earlier by The Hollywood Reporter. Dreams of Violets cost $2,000 to make […]...

item.title: Call of Duty: Warzone is dropping PS4 and Xbox One support later this year
item.description: Activision is planning to drop support for PS4 and Xbox One consoles in Call of Duty: Warzone later this year. Players will need to upgrade to a PS5 or Xbox Series S / X console to continue playing Call of Duty: Warzone once season 6 of Call of Duty: Black Ops 7 finishes later this […]

item.title: YouTube takes baby steps to being a real podcast app
item.description: New features coming to YouTube could make it better for listening to podcasts, rolling out to Premium subscribers starting today on Android and coming later to iOS. A new "on-the-go mode" shifts YouTube into an audio-first layout, with larger, simplified playback buttons, a still image in place of the video, and a timeline showing video […]

item.title: Prediction markets and sports betting apps are luring in teens. Here’s why experts are concerned
item.description: Polymarket and Kalshi are using memes to attract users as young as 18. When Rory McIlroy won the Masters for the second year in a row, Kalshi shared a photo of him on Instagram with the words, “Wait he’s goated.” When a video of NBA player Damian Lillard recovering from an injury circulated online, Kalshi’s main competitor Polymarket posted, “The league is cooked.”If you don’t know what either of those phrases mean, it’s because you may not be the target audience.The posts and hundreds of others like it are exposing younger people to prediction market platforms, where users can put money on th...

item.title: Un bug empêche Chrome de se lancer sur certaines tablettes Android : que faire ?
item.description: Un bug empêche le lancement de Chrome sur certaines tablettes Android. Un message indiquant « Vous pouvez avoir jusqu'à 5 fenêtres » apparaît systématiquement. En attendant une intervention de Google, une solution permet de résoudre le problème.

item.title: J’ai testé les écrans de la Ferrari Luce électrique : pourquoi Ferrari n’aurait pas pu faire mieux
item.description: J'ai pu monter à bord de la Ferrari Luce, la très décriée voiture électrique de la marque dessinée par les créateurs de l'iPhone et de l'Apple Watch. Une expérience aussi bluffante que cohérente, (quasiment) sans équivalent dans la production automobile. Voici ce que j'en ai pensé.

item.title: Meilleurs TV 55 pouces (140 cm) : quel modèle choisir en 2026 ? (OLED, QLED, Mini-LED)
item.description: La catégorie 55 pouces reste l'un des choix les plus populaires pour les téléviseurs. Voici notre sélection des meilleures TV de 55 pouces à tous les prix, qu'elles soient OLED, Mini LED ou LCD, mais toujours en 4K HDR.

item.title: What’s next for Microsoft’s Surface PCs?
item.description: Nearly 10 years ago I reviewed my favorite Surface device. Microsoft hand-delivered its Surface Studio all-in-one PC to me, and I was hooked from the moment I switched it on. It had a beautiful floating touchscreen that you could push all the way down into a drawing board mode, making it unlike anything I had […]

item.title: SpaceX’s $1.75 trillion IPO pitch relies on a lot of AI faith
item.description: The rocket launching company says it’ll become a major player in enterprise AI in the future. Welcome to AI Decoded, Fast Company’s weekly newsletter that breaks down the most important news in the world of AI. You can sign up to receive this newsletter every week via email here.

item.title: Subnautica 2 is a massive hit, so Krafton has to pay that $250 million bonus to devs
item.description: Krafton has been trying to weasel out of making paying the Subnautica 2 developer a bonus for a while now.

item.title: Acer Swift Spin 14 AI : un convertible Snapdragon X2 Elite avec stylet natif Wacom
item.description: Un convertible ARM avec stylet natif, 120 Hz et jusqu'à 23 heures d'autonomie : l'Acer Swift Spin 14 AI est attendu cet été en France selon le calendrier EMEA d'Acer (juillet 2026). Le prix français n'a pas été communiqué à ce stade.

item.title: How long is Anthropic’s lease with SpaceX? Opinions vary.
item.description: Elon Musk is publicly reframing xAI’s massive Anthropic compute deal as short-term and cancellable, despite SpaceX’s own S-1 filing describing payments through May 2029.

item.title: Sesame, the conversational AI startup from Oculus founders, launches its iOS app
item.description: Sesame’s new iOS app brings its conversational AI agents to the public, offering more natural back-and-forth interactions designed to feel less like traditional chatbots and more like talking to a person.

item.title: Polymarket blocks VPNs and tightens identity verification as over 30 countries ban the betting platform
item.description: Polymarket is taking a harder stance against VPN use and pushing for identity verification, marking a shift away from permissionless trading as more countries restrict the platform.

item.title: Slate Auto will start taking orders for its low-cost EV on June 24
item.description: The Bezos-backed EV startup has yet to announce final pricing for its vehicle, which is supposed to start shipping by the end of this year.

item.title: Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 is out in October, and it’s coming to the Switch 2
item.description: Activision has officially announced Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 and says the game will launch on October 23rd, 2026. Modern Warfare 4, which is developed by Infinity Ward, will be available on PS5, Xbox Series X / S, PC - and it will also be the first Call of Duty title to launch on […]

item.title: The secret to Roku’s success: not being cool
item.description: This is Lowpass by Janko Roettgers, a newsletter on the ever-evolving intersection of tech and entertainment, syndicated just for The Verge subscribers once a week. Roughly 10 years ago, someone told me that Roku was making "cheap hardware to sell to Walmart customers in flyover states." The remark was meant to be an insult, belittling […]

item.title: Modern Warfare 4 director on return of 'Mil-Sim' operators and upcoming Call of Duty's 'gritty' tone — 'We want those characters to feel set in our world'
item.description: The Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 developers tell us about the upcoming game's more gritty tone.

item.title: Proton Mail aims to make it easier for you to transition away from Gmail and ditch Google
item.description: Proton claims that managing your Gmail messages through its service offers you more privacy.

item.title: La Samsung Galaxy Watch 8 s’affiche à un prix inédit après plus de 40 % de remise
item.description: Si vous attendiez le moment parfait pour vous offrir la dernière montre connectée de Samsung, le voici. La Galaxy Watch 8 tombe à seulement 214,99 euros contre 379,99 euros à son lancement.

item.title: Netflix en juin 2026 : voici les films et séries à ne pas manquer au début de l’été
item.description: Netflix vient de dévoiler sa programmation pour juin 2026. Peu de films et de séries qui se démarquent cette fois-ci, hormis la deuxième saison de l'adaptation d'Avatar pour laquelle il va encore falloir se montrer patient.

item.title: Test du Asus ProArt PZ14 (2026) : la plus puissante tablette Windows
item.description: Asus n'a pas fini de nous étonner sur le format tablette dans l'univers Windows. Voici la ProArt PZ14 de 2026, une tablette définitivement destinée aux créatifs.

item.title: Are designers the new SWEs? Figma Make's new two-way GitHub integration turns designs into live, production code — with built-in governance
item.description: Cloud design software company Figma is officially transforming its AI design assistant, Figma Make, from a prototyping sandbox into a live, visual software editor that connects natively to production codebases. Announced today, the update allows product managers, designers, and non-technical builders to import an existing Git repository directly into the Figma desktop app, visually edit the application's underlying code via the canvas, and push those changes back to engineering through standard GitHub pull requests. Engineering Governance & LicensingCrucially for enterprise deployments, this i...

item.title: The premium 52-inch LG UltraGear Evo G9 5K2K gaming monitor hits best-ever price — save $300 at Amazon
item.description: The LG 52-inch UltraGear Evo G9 5K2K curved gaming monitor is on sale for $1,699.99 at Amazon, a 15% discount and its best price ever.

item.title: A grim new report shows food insecurity is getting worse in the K-shaped economy
item.description: More people, especially, those with children, are dipping into savings, missing meals, and receiving food donations, according to the New York Fed. Food insecurity is growing in the United States as inflation, war, drought, and more bring grocery prices higher.

item.title: Quel smartphone Motorola choisir en 2026 : les meilleurs modèles testés
item.description: En perte de vitesse, Motorola dispose cependant toujours de quelques smartphones intéressants. Petit tour d'horizon de ce que propose l'inventeur du téléphone portable en 2026.

item.title: Captain Price returns in Modern Warfare 4 for a Call of Duty campaign that 'feels both blockbuster in scale and grounded in authenticity'
item.description: Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 has been announced, and it will feature a new campaign that will return to the "grounded" roots the series is best known for.

item.title: Stan Lee's voice and likeness have been resurrected, thanks to AI
item.description: ElevenLabs can now offer the late Marvel icon Stan Lee as part of its AI-generated voice portfolio.

item.title: Airbus choisit Mistral AI pour propulser l’IA dans ses avions et ses systèmes de défense
item.description: Trois ans et déjà dans les cockpits. La startup française vient de décrocher l'accès aux quatre divisions d'Airbus, et elle n'a pas l'intention de s'arrêter là.

item.title: Here Comes Ojai, Waymo’s New Chinese-Made Robotaxi
item.description: The pale-blue Ojai vehicles will start picking up members of the public in California and Arizona in the next few weeks.

item.title: Waymo to begin passenger rides in its new Ojai robotaxi
item.description: After several months of testing, Waymo is finally ready to invite non-employee passengers into its newest vehicle, the Zeekr RT minivan, which has been rebranded as Ojai. Waymo says it will begin offering "select riders" access in San Francisco, Los Angeles, and Phoenix, before "gradually" expanding to more riders and cities. Trips will be free […]

item.title: ‘If you’re buying the same game every year, that’s not healthy’ — Modern Warfare 4 director on huge mechanical changes shaping the next Call of Duty
item.description: We speak to the developers of Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 about some of the new systems in the upcoming game.

item.title: HBO Max quietly drops first look footage for The Gilded Age season 4 — but I'm convinced that the George and Bertha reunion scene isn't what it seems
item.description: The new trailer for HBO Max's 2026 slate revealed the first look at The Gilded Age season 4. George and Bertha are seemingly back together... but that just can't be right.

item.title: How to watch 2026 Premier League Darts Finals Night: Free Streams & Schedule
item.description: Here's how to watch PDC Premier League Darts Finals Night live streams online from anywhere in the world, as the final four battle it out to lift the famous trophy at London's O2.

item.title: ‘Nothing in its class comes close’: the Xiaomi 17T Pro is being called ‘the telephoto master’, but how does its 5x zoom perform in reality? I took over 500 photos to find out
item.description: The Xiaomi 17T Pro has launched with a Leica-tuned 5x telephoto camera, and I went to Vienna to put this zoom lens to the test.

item.title: Modern Warfare 4 announcement confirms October release, Nintendo Switch 2 version, and that new Call of Duty is skipping last gen
item.description: Activision has officially announced the next mainline entry in the Call of Duty series, Modern Warfare 4, and it's slated to release later this year.

item.title: SQL query logs hold the context AI agents need to stop hallucinating joins
item.description: When Miro’s data team pointed AI agents directly at its Snowflake environment, the agents got the wrong answer more than 65% of the time. The problem wasn’t the model — it was context. With more than 10,000 tables and no semantic layer to guide routing, the agents had no way to know which data assets matched which business questions.DataHub is releasing a context intelligence layer Thursday that mines existing SQL query history to build a semantic index — and exposes it to agents via MCP, LangChain, Google’s Agent Development Kit and CrewAI. The company calls it Context Intelligence, and it’s ...

item.title: Microsoft’s AI Copilot is getting a human-focused streamlining
item.description: The company is aiming to make the software easier to use for a growing number of workplace and personal tasks. Microsoft’s AI Copilot is getting a revamp aimed at making it faster, simpler, and more closely aligned with how customers actually use AI.The company recently announced a series of internal shifts, naming Jon Friedman as Microsoft’s first chief design officer for Microsoft 365, the productivity suite formerly known as Office 365, and installing Jacob Andreou as EVP of Copilot. ...

item.title: Ford’s hottest business right now has absolutely nothing to do with cars
item.description: The automaker’s surprise rally is being fueled by a new business selling batteries to AI-hungry data centers instead of drivers. Automakers not named Tesla aren’t accustomed to dramatic stock spikes, but Ford is on a run of its own right now.

item.title: Xiaomi lance la Watch S5, une montre élégante avec trois semaines d’autonomie
item.description: La Xiaomi Watch S5 mise sur un boîtier circulaire élégant en acier et un écran Amoled ultra-lumineux. Mais son véritable atout face aux modèles Wear OS réside dans son système HyperOS, qui lui permet d’afficher jusqu’à trois semaines d’autonomie pour un prix sous la barre des 180 euros.
